title: Mr.Cat's Modpack
description: The modpack for players that love mixed adventures!
body:
# WELCOME TO MrCat's Modpack!

## Why you should download this modpack?:
This modpack is for players that want mixed adventures whit Create mods, Vanilla+ features, shaders and e,t,c.

## Warnings:
- This modpack is curently not stable and it might have lots of bugs if you see some please - report this in our discord server.

- Sometimes my modpack is gonna take a long time ro relese during these factors : Modpack testing, mod adding/removal, errors during modpack sarting.

- Never use this modpack on other servers if its possible unless its my worlds.

- This modpack requres pretty stong pc or else it will lag for you!

## Other:
If you want join my world make sure you downloaded the latest version. if its not working try ping me in DM's for working version [most its future version]
You must have legit minecraft to play thi modpack since some mods are requesting legit minecraft.

That's all what you need to know about this modpack! download it by your choice and let the adventure begin!

Discord server for bug reports : [Click me!](https://discord.gg/5aQCpfpKtd)
